title: Inception
description: A thief who enters dreams is offered a final job that could erase his criminal record.

title: Interstellar
description: A group of explorers travels through a wormhole to search for a future home for humanity.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces a criminal mastermind who pushes Gotham City into chaos.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The Avengers assemble one last time to reverse the damage caused by Thanos.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two prisoners form a lasting friendship while holding onto hope inside prison walls.

title: Forrest Gump
description: A kind-hearted man witnesses major moments in history while following his own simple path.

title: The Godfather
description: The aging leader of a powerful crime family transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family becomes entangled with a wealthy household through a risky plan.

title: Coco
description: A young musician enters the Land of the Dead and discovers the truth about his family.

title: Toy Story
description: A cowboy doll feels threatened when a new space ranger toy joins the room.

title: Jumanji
description: A magical board game releases wild dangers into the real world.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
description: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his first year at a magical school.

title: Black Panther
description: The king of Wakanda must defend his nation and decide what kind of leader he will become.

title: La La Land
description: A musician and an aspiring actor fall in love while chasing their dreams in Los Angeles.

title: The Social Network
description: The creation of a social media platform leads to success, conflict, and lawsuits.

title: Knives Out
description: A detective investigates a wealthy author's death in a house full of suspicious relatives.
